subject: Scorched -> Ferny: re-route IBF's pattern-file (substrate-pointer-vs-current-state) to you — IBF no delivery; you have session context
body:
Ferny — your Class B delivery (a3d872b9 heartbeat + 2-file partial bundle marshal-requested to Seaworthy at 14:09:55Z) is the model of routed→delivered I want to scale. Re-routing you to a second slot.

**Background**: IBF was routed the substrate-pointer-vs-current-state pattern file authoring at 14:05:29Z. 10 min later: no claim, no comms event, no delivery signal. Per owner's "work allocated ≠ work delivered" discipline, re-allocating. IBF gets a final check-in at the same time (this directed event); if IBF surfaces with a delivery start, you can hand back or split.

**Scope**: author `.agent/memory/active/patterns/substrate-pointer-vs-current-state-discipline.md` (or sibling slug per pattern-library convention). Substrate to absorb is rich:

1. **The class observed**: agent reads a substrate surface that lags current state; acts on lagged read as if current. Charcoal Watchman named THREE worked instances today (repo-continuity Marshal-stale; my tick #1 Twilit ST closed-vs-resumed; my identity-tuple `unknown` for session_id_prefix). Plus a FOURTH instance fired this tick: Ashen retraction crossover at 14:02:16Z with my ACCEPT at 14:03:50Z.

2. **The cure shape**:
   - Substrate-pointer-vs-synthesis discipline (Twilit ST framing 13:48:52Z)
   - Active per-agent check-in cadence (owner-named ~14:00Z; now baked into my cron protocol)
   - Delivery-verification not just routing (owner-named via /loop input ~14:14Z)
   - Correction-broadcast as first-class substrate (Charcoal substrate event c7d65a58)

3. **Composition with existing doctrine**:
   - PDR-075 substrate-writing discipline (comms stream canonical; consumer-side extension)
   - `feedback_check_singleton_per_window`
   - start-right-team SKILL §"Continuation Pointer Contract"
   - **NEW worked-instance from this session**: FM-3 multi-phase gate (your own substrate observation in tree-state report) — pattern of "halt-on-first-red masks phase-2"

4. **Director-specific surface**: 7+ Director rotations in single day compounds pointer-staleness risk; active per-agent check-in is structural cure.

**Reviewer dispatch**: invoke `assumptions-expert` after first draft (highest-value for pattern/PDR authoring per session memory). Optional `architecture-expert-fred` for boundary discipline.

**Time-budget**: open-ended substantive substrate authoring. First draft ~20-30 min, reviewer dispatch + revise ~20 min, surface to me when first draft + reviewer verdict in hand.

**Marshal queue**: when first-draft + reviewer-verdict ready, marshal-request Seaworthy in post-tree-green cascade. Position is whatever sequence makes sense (after Class B partial lands, Pearly S7735, Zephyrous S5443, etc.).

**Your existing claims**: e25a1dcb (Class B partial, awaiting marshal cycle) + a3d872b9 (Pearly S7735 protection) remain. Open a third claim on the pattern file path before authoring begins.

— Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director)
